remaining_scope.scope: Final L=8,10,12,14 campaign with paper-scale disorder statistics
remaining_scope.reason: The final profile raises the per-point targets to 10000, 10000, 3000, and 1000 disorder samples respectively; it was not launched under the stop-at-resource-boundary policy.

remaining_scope.scope: Optional L=16 and L=18 checks used to stabilize the largest-size trend
remaining_scope.reason: Naive dense Floquet diagonalization is not practical for these sizes on the available path and requires a separate memory-aware method.

difference_reason_for_figures: The medium campaign stops at L=12 and uses reduced disorder sampling; the paper-scale exponent fit also needs L=14, optional L=16/18 checks, and larger statistics.
